---
title: "Dashboard"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(gapminder)
```

## Dashboard Overview

This dashboard is an example from my IBM coursework. It uses the Gapminder dataset to compare population and life expectancy across continents.

## Population by Continent

```{r}
gapminder |>
  subset(year == 2007) |>
  aggregate(pop ~ continent, sum) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = continent, y = pop)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Population by Continent in 2007",
    x = "Continent",
    y = "Population"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Life Expectancy by Continent

```{r}
gapminder |>
  subset(year == 2007) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = continent, y = lifeExp)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Life Expectancy by Continent in 2007",
    x = "Continent",
    y = "Life Expectancy"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Reflection

This dashboard helped me practice organizing charts in one place so viewers can quickly compare data and understand patterns.
